ssh_paramiko_base64.name: SSH via Paramiko with Base64 Encoding
ssh_paramiko_base64.problem: SSH connection that blocks interactive shells or times out
ssh_paramiko_base64.solution: Use base64-encoded Python paramiko script to execute SSH programmatically
ssh_paramiko_base64.python_template:
import paramiko
ssh = paramiko.SSHClient()
ssh.set_missing_host_key_policy(paramiko.AutoAddPolicy())
ssh.connect('{host}', port={port}, username='{user}', password='{password}')
stdin, stdout, stderr = ssh.exec_command('{command}')
print(stdout.read().decode())
ssh.close()
ssh_paramiko_base64.notes: Avoids interactive prompts entirely. Requires paramiko installed.

sshpass_automation.name: SSH with sshpass
sshpass_automation.problem: Need to automate SSH login with password
sshpass_automation.solution: Use sshpass tool to provide password non-interactively
sshpass_automation.notes: Requires sshpass package. Simpler than paramiko but less flexible.

base64_encoding.name: Base64 Encoding for Shell Bypass
base64_encoding.problem: Command blocked by pattern matching, need to obfuscate code
base64_encoding.solution: Encode the command with base64, decode and execute
base64_encoding.notes: Useful when output shows command blocked but base64 decoding isn't blocked
